plugins.name: monitor
plugins.description: Monitor your Claude Code and Codex sessions — a usage dashboard (sessions, tokens, cost, model mix) plus a per-project cockpit (goal + decision log + live session view).

plugins.name: dispatch
plugins.description: Plan before you fly — interview-driven specs you can execute. preflight gathers requirements into a single in-conversation plan; flightplan writes a multi-file blueprint (PLAN.md + tasks/) to disk; autopilot flies the tree with a dev→verify→judge→score quality loop and a closing final-review gate; waypoints maps a whole project into milestone legs and plans each one just-in-time.

plugins.name: relay
plugins.description: Delegate a task to another harness — relay work to the codex, opencode, or claude CLI (delegate / review / image), capture the result, and report back.

plugins.name: chronicle
plugins.description: Write and guard your project's history — craft commits (auto simple/atomic) and author reviewer-legible PRs/MRs enriched by the cockpit decision trail.

plugins.name: herdr
plugins.description: Herdr terminal workspace manager reference + in-session agent orchestration — config, CLI, plugin development, and controlling sibling panes/agents when running inside a herdr pane.
